summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Judge Bias Detection feature. All 14 test items passed. 6 judges returned with all required fields. Modal with 5 tabs works correctly. Filters, search, and close button all functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 test items verified: GET /api/judges returns 6 judges with bias_breakdown, report_card, comparable_cases, timeline, temporal_patterns, outlier_score. GET /api/judges/judge-002 returns Arun Kumar Mishra HIGH RISK with grade F. UI: JudgeProfiles page loads 6 cards with grade badge strips, search/risk filters work, 5-tab modal (Overview/Report Card/Comparable Cases/Timeline/Temporal) all render correct data, close button works. Mocked data: judge bias data is seeded mock data, not real court records.
mocked_apis: /api/judges - returns seeded mock judge bias data (not real court records)
